all.message:
Good afternoon commuters 🙋🏾‍♂️

We are currently upgrading our servers to handle a massive increase in commuter traffic!

You may experience temporary loading issues or be forced into 'Offline Mode' over the next 24 hours while we migrate our systems.

Thank you for your patience!

— Enock

all_EC.message:
Dear EC Commuters,

The Next Train project, recently launched the Eastern Cape schedules, but our prices are not yet accurate.
If you commute on these routes, please feel free to use the reply button below, to let us know of the correct ticket prices or any timetable errors etc.

Thank you for riding with us!


— Enock

all_WC.message:
Hello Western Cape commuters,

Thank you for your continued support.
We are actively working on adding more routes and correcting schedules, especially Saturday schedules.

On that note, I'm looking for volunteers based in Cape Town to help finalize the Western Cape rollout. 

If you know the routes well (or ticket pricing) and want to contribute, I'd love to hear from you.

You can reach out anonymously by simply replying to this post, or attach your email or WhatsApp number in the app's feedback section and I'll get back to you.

Thanks everyone 🙏🏾


— Enock

bellville-mutual.message:
Hello Western Cape commuters!

We're actively adding more train routes to the Web App.

If you’re missing a specific route, please let us know & share its schedule image with us using the feedback button at the bottom right of the screen. Your input helps us improve!

Thanks for your patience.

— Enock

jhb-soweto.message:
Naledi Line disruption 
> Monday 25 May

Perway maintenance is cancelling several off-peak services between 09:00 and 14:00 today.

Cancelled trains:
- NLD 9311 – 08:50 from Naledi
- JHB 9312 – 09:50 from Johannesburg
- NLD 9315 – 10:50 from Naledi
- JHB 9316 – 11:50 from Johannesburg
- NLD 9321 – 12:50 from Naledi
- JHB 9322 – 13:50 from Johannesburg

Normal service resumes after 14:00.


— Next Train Ops

mab-belle.message: — Next Train Ops

pta-dewildt.message:
Good morning commuters 🙋🏾‍♂️

NEW DE WILDT DIRECT SCHEDULE
The updated timetable is now live! Trains now run directly without transferring at Rosslyn.

How to verify you have the new times:

Look under the route name on the main screen for: Effective: 8 April 2026

Open the menu and check the bottom for version v6.04.07

If you still see the old Rosslyn transfers schedule, open the menu (top left) and tap Check for Updates to sync the new timetable instantly.

— Next Train Ops

1779169014152.message:
Randfontein to Roodepoort line
SERVICE CANCELLED

What’s up:
PRASA Metrorail has cancelled all trains between Randfontein and Roodepoort due to 5 spans of overhead cable cut at Milsite. Status is RED 🔴

What’s being done:
Protection Services and electrical teams are on site repairing the fault.

Impact:
No trains running on that line until repairs are finished. No ETA yet.

What to do:
Make alternative travel arrangements and check with station staff for updates.

PRASA will share more info once the technical team reports back.

1777249955300.message:
Due to a severe sinkhole, the line between Centurion and Irene is fully closed for approx 5 weeks.
• Pretoria trains terminate at Centurion.
• Kempton Park trains terminate at Irene.
• No replacement buses are available.
Refunds for Monthly/Weekly tickets are available at ticket offices.

1778490981575.message: Train services from Atteridgeville to Pretoria will continue until further notice, owing to an incident at Saulsville station.
